title: Unique 33446EU - Plastic Free Paper Cups - 266 ml - Silver Colour - 14 Count (Pack of 1)
features: Ideal for serving drinks at a birthday party, Christmas or New Year's Eve party
Combine with other silver party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Serve your party drinks in majestic style with these silver paper cups. Featuring a rich metallic silver shade, these party cups are perfect for serving warm or cold beverages to your party guests. As these cups are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Silver cups are ideal for a wedding, new year's eve party, silver wedding anniversary party, Christmas party, and so much more. Safety Warning No warning applicable
